title: Cybercrime Reporting & Safety
rights: Right to report cybercrimes anonymously on the National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal (cybercrime.gov.in)
Immediate banking protection: Report financial fraud within 3 days to avoid liability
Protection against non-consensual sharing of intimate images (IT Act)
avoid: Do not delete evidence (keep screenshots, URLs, and transaction IDs)
Do not engage with blackmailers or pay ransoms
